narrative:
Groveport-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,138 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.5%, a modest Republican lean of 5.1 percentage points.
